api: JSON batching ($batch) over Outlook mail folders/messages

rules: At most 20 requests per batch; split larger workloads into consecutive batches, filling each to the limit.
id is a required string, unique within the batch (a duplicate id fails the whole batch with 400).
url is the RELATIVE resource URL: /users/{id}/mailFolders/... , never the absolute https://graph.microsoft.com/... form.
GET subrequests carry no body; a body would require a Content-Type entry in that subrequest's headers.
A 200 on the batch POST says nothing about the subrequests; each subresponse carries its own status.
Subresponses arrive in ARBITRARY order; correlate strictly by id.
Subresponse errors use the standard Graph envelope { "error": { "code", "message" } }.

notes: The server may return fewer items per page than $top; its page size is its own business.
A messages page with more data carries @odata.nextLink (absolute URL with an opaque $skiptoken).

rules: Follow @odata.nextLink until absent; a page may hold zero items.

Continuation requests go through $batch as relative URLs: strip exactly the version base (https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0) from the nextLink and keep path + query byte-for-byte. The mock rejects a continuation whose query differs from the link it issued.
Group all continuations that are due into as few batches as possible; batches are issued sequentially.

throttling.retry_after_header: Retry-After (seconds, in the subresponse headers object)
rules: The batch POST itself returns 200 even when some subrequests are throttled.
Throttled subrequests are NOT retried automatically by anything; the client retries exactly those, together, in a new batch after waiting the LONGEST Retry-After among them (via the injected delay).
Successful sibling subresponses are kept; they must not be re-requested.
At most maxRetries retry rounds per subrequest, then the owning folder reports error {status: 429, code: "TooManyRequests", retryAfter: <last value>}.
Non-429 subresponse errors (e.g. 404 ErrorItemNotFound) are terminal: never retried, reported on the owning folder as {status, code, message}, siblings unaffected.
